title: AsYasya's Legacy Copper
description: Legacy copper textures for Create 6.0.0+, Create Slice & Dice, Create Factory Logistics, Create Deco, Create: Mixed Casing, Create Encased, Create: Bells & Whistles and Create: Sound of Steam
body:
# This pack reimagines [Create 6.0.0's](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/version/1.20.1-6.0.0) copper textures to match with the legacy style, as well as supports [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), [Create Factory Logistics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_factory_logistics), [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco), [Create: Mixed Casing](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mixed-casing), [Create Encased](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-encased), [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles) and [Create: Sound of Steam](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sound-of-steam)!


## All decorative blocks from Create are unchanged, also chocolate is changed to not look like molten copper.
### There is also an OG Texture version that uses as many pre 6.0.0 textures and models as there are in these mods.
You may use this resource pack in your modpacks with credit!
![Copper changes:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54dac00f035c44e0eb88b7ffa6ee351d5b67221c.png)
![Copper changes2:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56575788f494330e6f15f934c7509c8cb5b1d04c.png)
